title: ceterach cordatum
intro: Ceterach cordatum, also known as the cord-crested rockcap, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ceterach cordatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Ceterach cordatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
